changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 7

changeSet.comment: Create Test Assignment and Machine Scheduling page for MNTD Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Link samples to experiments and schedule machine time. Assign experiment category: Molecular (qPCR, PCR), Genomics, Digital PCR, Serology (ELISA, Multiplex), Culture, or Flow Cytometry. Specify the assay or protocol to use. For machine scheduling, select the instrument, date and time slot, and assign an operator. System will send test orders to integrated machines, block machine calendar, and log user activity.

column.name: content
column.value: {"pageDescription":"Test Assignment and Machine Scheduling","dataPoints":{"testAssignment":{"experimentCategory":{"type":"choice","label":"Experiment Category","options":["Molecular (qPCR)","Molecular (PCR)","Genomics","Digital PCR","Serology (ELISA)","Serology (Multiplex)","Culture","Flow Cytometry"],"required":true},"specificAssay":{"type":"text","label":"Specific Assay / Protocol","example":"Malaria Pf/Pv qPCR, Leishmania ELISA","required":false},"assignmentNotes":{"type":"text","label":"Assignment Notes","multiline":true,"required":false}},"machineScheduling":{"instrument":{"type":"reference","label":"Instrument","source":"instrument_inventory","required":true},"scheduledDate":{"type":"date","label":"Scheduled Date","required":true},"scheduledTime":{"type":"time","label":"Time Slot","required":false},"operatorName":{"type":"text","label":"Operator Name","required":false},"schedulingNotes":{"type":"text","label":"Scheduling Notes","multiline":true,"required":false}}},"systemActions":["Send test order to machine (if integrated)","Block machine calendar","Log user activity"],"bulkOperations":{"enabled":true,"applyToSelected":["experimentCategory","specificAssay","instrument","scheduledDate","scheduledTime","operatorName"]},"nextPage":"Test Execution and Raw Data"}

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 7

changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'MNTD' AND display_order = 7

changeSet.comment: Insert MNTD Test Assignment and Machine Scheduling workflow page template

column.name: description
column.value: Link samples to experiments and schedule machine time for test execution

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Assign experiment category (Molecular qPCR/PCR, Genomics, Digital PCR, Serology ELISA/Multiplex, Culture, Flow Cytometry) and specific assay. Schedule instrument, date/time slot, and operator. System sends test orders to integrated machines.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Test Assignment and Machine Scheduling - Experiment and instrument scheduling
